label: Population (2024 est.)
deltaNote: Most populous country in Africa; 7th globally

label: Nominal GDP (2024)
deltaNote: Largest economy in Africa; oil accounts for ~6% of GDP but ~80% of export revenue

label: Inflation Rate (Feb 2024)
deltaNote: Post-subsidy removal and naira devaluation spike; food inflation over 35%

label: Crude Oil Output (2024)
contestNote: OPEC figures disputed; NGOs estimate lower due to oil theft losses exceeding 150,000 bpd
deltaNote: Recovery from pipeline vandalism; OPEC quota is 1.5 mbpd

label: Poverty Headcount (2023)
contestNote: NBS methodology revisions disputed; multidimensional poverty index shows 65%+
deltaNote: COVID-19 and subsidy removal impact; ~87 million in extreme poverty

label: Conflict Fatalities (2023)
contestNote: Government figures significantly lower; ACLED cross-checks multiple independent sources
deltaNote: Boko Haram/ISWAP, banditry, farmer-herder, and separatist violence combined

label: Nollywood Films/Year
deltaNote: Third largest film industry globally by volume; ~$1B annual revenue

label: Naira/USD Rate (2024)
deltaNote: CBN unified exchange rate policy June 2023; naira floated; historic devaluation
